name: db-api-rs-skills
description: Agent workflows for generating, validating, applying, exporting, importing, and verifying DBAPI configurations.

skills.name: dbapi-generate-table-apis
skills.purpose: Generate reviewable CRUD/list/table/view SQL bundle files from an existing datasource table.

skills.name: dbapi-generate-sql-api
skills.purpose: Generate one reviewable API bundle from SQL or View SQL.

skills.name: dbapi-apply-api-bundle
skills.purpose: Validate and apply generated DBAPI bundle files after review.

skills.name: dbapi-token-workflow
skills.purpose: Create an app, authorize a group, generate a token, and prepare authenticated curl calls.

skills.name: dbapi-export-import-workflow
skills.purpose: Export and import API configs and groups through DBAPI management endpoints.

skills.name: dbapi-demo-crud
skills.purpose: Seed and verify the historical local demo CRUD API set.
